title: Executive Tutor (Chemistry, Physics, Math)
description:
About My Masterclass
My Masterclass is a boutique tuition centre in Singapore specialising in Secondary and IP Math & Science. We take pride in our proven track record of helping students excel at O, IP, and A levels, through a close-knit partnership between tutor, student, and parent. Our students are motivated learners from strong academic schools, and our tutors are passionate educators dedicated to bringing out their best.

The Opportunity

We are inviting a Executive Tutor to join our dynamic team. This is a role for an educator who has:

  • 1-2 years of experience teaching in tuition centre or private tuition setting
  • Some familiarity with the O-Level syllabus for chemistry, physics and/or math
  • A passion for inspiring students and helping them build mastery and confidence
  • A willingness to teach and improve on My Masterclass’ structured curriculum and materials

This is an excellent opportunity for a driven, results-oriented tutor seeking career growth within a premium brand that values quality teaching, innovation, and teamwork.

Responsibilities

In Your First 1–2 Years:

  • Training to be familiarize with content, curriculum and SOW.
  • Teaching assistant and conducting engaging and effective lessons
  • Guide students using our proven pedagogy
  • Provide timely feedback and academic progress updates to students and parents
  • Maintain excellent classroom management and rapport with students

As You Grow With Us (Years 3–6):

  • Independently conduct classes, handle students scheme of work, progress and assessment details.
  • Conduct classes of up to 14 students.
  • Contribute to developing materials and digital resources
  • Participate in marketing, community outreach, and content initiatives

What We Offer

  • A supportive and collaborative team culture that values professional integrity
  • Structured growth pathways beyond classroom teaching
  • Opportunities to be part of curriculum development, training, and centre leadership

Who We’re Looking For

  • Minimum 1-2 years’ experience teaching IP/O Level in centers or private settings
  • Five working days with both weekends commitment
  • Strong subject mastery, attention to details and ability to explain complex concepts clearly
  • Strong interpersonal skills and a genuine care for student success
  • Aligned with My Masterclass’ teaching philosophy and standards of excellence

Application

If you’re passionate about teaching and ready to grow with a brand that values quality, trust, and professionalism, we’d love to hear from you.

Please email your resume and career aspirations to:
📧 msjanice@mymasterclass.com.sg

postedCompany.description: At My Masterclass, we focus on Secondary Mathematics and Science Tuition across levels (IP, Express, Normal). Math & Science are cornerstones of Singapore Education. With a strong foundation, interest, and understanding of the subjects, there are endless prospects and opportunities in the future.
postedCompany.name: MASTERCLASS PTE. LTD.
